title: sida acrantha
intro: Sida acrantha, also known as the thorny sida or prickly sida, is a plant species within the mallow family, characterized by its thorny stems and leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Sida acrantha include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In traditional herbal preparations, Sida acrantha is often made into a tea or tincture to treat various ailments, and it is also used as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
